evals.prompt: I want to set up my GitHub profile to look good for recruiters. My username is 'jchen-dev'. I'm a full-stack developer at a fintech startup, working mostly with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. I've been coding for 4 years and have a few open source projects with ~50 stars each. I want to seem professional but approachable.
evals.expected_output: A polished profile README.md for the jchen-dev/jchen-dev repo with greeting, tech stack badges, GitHub stats widgets, featured projects section, and social links. Plus specific recommendations for bio text, pinned repos strategy, and metadata settings.

evals.prompt: Help me create an organization profile README for our startup 'NebulaDev'. We make developer tools — our main product is an open-source deployment platform called 'nebula-deploy' with 2k stars. We also have a CLI tool and a VS Code extension. We're hiring and want the profile to attract both contributors and potential hires.
evals.expected_output: Organization profile README at .github/profile/README.md that describes NebulaDev, showcases key products with links, includes hiring/contributing CTAs, and has social links. Plus recommendations for member-only README, domain verification, and pinned repos.

evals.prompt: My GitHub profile looks bare — username is 'maria-codes'. I've been coding for 3 years, mostly Python and data science stuff (pandas, scikit-learn, pytorch). I have a few Jupyter notebook repos but no profile README at all. I want something that shows I'm serious about ML/AI work.
evals.expected_output: Profile README.md with data science/ML focus, appropriate tech stack badges, stats widgets, section highlighting ML projects, and recommendations for improving pinned repos. Should include specific advice on making Jupyter notebook repos more presentable.
